title: New PR councillor promises 'Ek baiza nie'
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Municipality has officially welcomed Richard Kakora as the new Patriotic Alliance (PA) proportional representation (PR) councillor, following his appointment to serve the local community.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Municipality has officially welcomed Richard Kakora as the new Patriotic Alliance (PA) proportional representation (PR) councillor, following his appointment to serve the local community."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The swearing-in ceremony took place in the Knysna municipal council chambers on Friday 28 November."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Born in Port Elizabeth and a permanent resident of Knysna since 2011, Kakora brings extensive community experience and a strong commitment to public service. He was instrumental in establishing the town's first black business forum, aimed at addressing the challenges faced by small contractors.","html":"Born in Port Elizabeth and a permanent resident of Knysna since 2011, Kakora brings extensive community experience and a strong commitment to public service. He was instrumental in establishing the town's first black business forum, aimed at addressing the challenges faced by small contractors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition, he has served on the governing body of Sunridge Primary School and holds a diploma in contract management, alongside certification as an asbestos contractor.","html":"In addition, he has served on the governing body of Sunridge Primary School and holds a diploma in contract management, alongside certification as an asbestos contractor."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As a PR councillor, Kakora has pledged to be highly visible in the community, conducting regular ward walkabouts and engaging directly with residents."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Ons baiza nie,\" he said, referencing the PA's slogan, and assured the people of Knysna that when it comes to service delivery and being a voice in Council, \"Ek baiza nie\".","html":"\"Ons baiza nie,\" he said, referencing the PA's slogan, and assured the people of Knysna that when it comes to service delivery and being a voice in Council, \"Ek baiza nie\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"My focus as councillor will be to actively participate in the community and ensure that the concerns of our people are heard,\" Kakora said.","html":"\"My focus as councillor will be to actively participate in the community and ensure that the concerns of our people are heard,\" Kakora said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"I am aware of the challenges our town faces, and I am determined to tackle them head-on. Councillors and the administration alike must remain accountable to the people they serve.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kakora fills the vacancy left by former councillor Waleed Grootboom. His appointment is seen as a strategic move by the PA to strengthen its presence in Knysna and prepare for the next local elections.","html":"Kakora fills the vacancy left by former councillor Waleed Grootboom. His appointment is seen as a strategic move by the PA to strengthen its presence in Knysna and prepare for the next local elections."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Municipality expressed confidence that Kakora will bring \"heart, integrity, and a genuine commitment to service, making a positive impact on the lives of residents across the town\".","html":"Knysna Municipality expressed confidence that Kakora will bring \"heart, integrity, and a genuine commitment to service, making a positive impact on the lives of residents across the town\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Newly appointed PA PR councillor, Richard Kakora.","html":"Newly appointed PA PR councillor, Richard Kakora."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: New PR councillor promises 'Ek baiza nie'
